title.en: Then, the Undead Lord revealed a shocking secret.

content.en:
Then, the Undead Lord revealed a shocking secret.

"It is said that His Royal Highness Wanfa is also the founder of the Immortal Clan Plan, the Sword Feather God Master, the reason why you can become a cosmic god is also thanks to the Immortal Plan, if there is no Immortal Plan, you will not be able to become an Immortal Clan at all, and you will not be able to improve your cultivation talent and get lucky to step into the ranks of the Cosmic Gods. The galaxy class has a lifespan limit, but the cosmic god does not. You have such an opportunity now, and you have lost His Highness Wanfa, but now you have angered His Highness Wanfa, what should I say about you. "

The Sword Feather Divine Lord was dumbfounded, he never expected that His Highness Wanfa had something to do with the Immortal Clan's plan.

Immediately, the undead army lord said: "In addition to the founder of the Immortal Clan Project, I also learned that His Highness Wanfa is the most talented and strongest in the same level of our human race, and even in the previous prosperous world, His Highness Wanfa suppressed all the Highnesses of all the races in the universe, known as the strongest Highness in the universe, and even the great supremes attach great importance to His Highness Wanfa. Because of this, the Supremes sent a Lord to serve as the guard of His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws. Now, do you understand the status of His Highness Wanfa among the human race?"

"Got it!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord nodded again and again, but he was very flustered in his heart.

The status of Ye Tian, His Royal Highness of Ten Thousand Laws, is too high, if he really wants to deal with him, let his master guard take action directly, he doesn't know how to die.

He should be glad that the Sword Emperor Sect did not completely offend His Highness Wanfa, otherwise the Sword Emperor Sect, which had just been promoted to a hegemon-level force, would probably decline.

"Hmph, Hei Yu really caused chaos for me, almost ruining the foundation of the Sword Emperor Sect for countless years. I'm going to punish him well!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord said secretly.

But he forgot that the Black Shadow Sword mainly protected the Yun family, and it was authorized by him.

......

Earth.

Ye Tian is back.

For him, the matter of the Yun family was just an episode.

Soon after, Ye Tian left the earth, but took some earthlings with him, all of whom were talented earthlings, and also took away his wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu.

He was going to let Xiao Yue and Ye Yu establish a Heavenly Pavilion in the Terran Sanctuary Tianlan Giant City.

In terms of cultivation as strength, Xiao Yue is not strong at the level of Ye Yu, and it is difficult to mix in Tianlan Giant City, but with Ye Tian's help, it is very different.

Now, in the Terran Tianlan Giant City, many big forces know about Ye Tian's existence, so no one will suppress Tiange, and even promote Tiange, and when the cultivation of the human beings on the earth is improved, a strong person is born, and the status of Tiange will naturally improve.

The reason why Ye Tian asked Xiao Yue to come to Tianlan Giant City to establish the Heavenly Pavilion was that he still hoped that his wife Xiao Yue would be closer to him, so that he could see his wife at any time.

In addition, the Terran Sanctuary is the core star field of the Terran, so it is the central area of the Terran, and the security is far greater than that of other star fields.

If you stay in Tianlan Giant City, Xiao Yue and Ye Yu's safety will not need to worry, and even the supremes of the alien race will not dare to come to Tianlan Giant City.

If he stayed on the earth all the time, as Ye Tian's reputation grew, maybe some alien races would sneak into the Terran area and attack Ye Tian's family.

This may not be nothing, so it must be eliminated.

Even if the human high-level may not be able to rescue in time, and the earth and the galaxy are located on the edge of the human race, the alien race really wants to kill them, and the high-level human race may not be able to rescue in time, in case of negligence, it will be the result that Ye Tian does not want to see.

Tianlan Giant City.

Ye Tian and his wife, sister and others descended on Tianlan Giant City, walking on the street, many people greeted Ye Tian one after another and met Ye Tian, but the cosmic god guards protected Ye Tian, and others did not dare to approach.

"Tianlan Giant City is so big! There are so many strong people!"

Xiao Yue was slightly surprised.

She is only at the peak of the true god level now, although she can match many great god-level powerhouses, but there are too many true god-level and god-level powerhouses in Tianlan Giant City, and even some galaxy-level and galaxy-level powerhouses can be seen at any time.

Even some roadside stall owners may be a galaxy-level powerhouse, and some shopkeepers may be a god-level power.

Along.

Xiao Yue, Ye Yu and others were amazed again and again, as if they were countrymen entering the city.

Soon, Ye Tian bought a small area for Xiao Yue and the others in Tianlan Giant City, with residential areas, high-rise buildings, large halls, etc., and paid a lot of price, even the galaxy-level powerhouses could not buy it.

However, Ye Tian easily took out this asset, after all, he had killed many foreign highnesses, and the assets of those foreign highnesses were very rich, and some treasures could be sold casually, and many divine crystals could be sold.

Therefore, Ye Tian is not short of money now, nor is he short of ordinary resources.

After settling his wife and sister, Ye Tian returned to the supreme hall of the human race.

In the following days, he was ready to cultivate well, striving to improve his strength a little more, and then go to the True God level.

In the blink of an eye, three years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had improved a little, and now he had compressed his immortal power by ten times, which could be regarded as having achieved his previous goal.

Just when Ye Tian was thinking about whether to attack the True God level, the Kunwu Supreme summoned him.

Kungo Temple.

When Ye Tian saw the Kunwu Supreme, he bent down and said, "I've seen the Kunwu Supreme!"

In this Kunwu Palace, there are no other Supremes, only Kunwu Supreme is alone, and it is obvious that Kunwu Supreme summoned him alone.

"Ye Tian, this time I came to you to ask you not to impact the god level for the time being!" said Kunwu Supreme.

"Why?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Because the Yuangu Hall is about to open!" Kunwu Supreme said: "If you hit the True God level now, although it won't take long to cultivate to the ninth order of the god level, it will take some time to restore the combat power to the Supreme level, and the combat power of the same level at that time will definitely not be as good as now." Therefore, you'd better stay at the god level for a while and maintain your supreme-level combat power at the god level, so that you can get a real chance in the Yuan Gu Palace!"

"What is the Yuangu Palace?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Kunwu Supreme explained: "There are many great opportunities in the universe, among which the ruins world is one, and the Yuangu Palace is also a great opportunity that is not weaker than the ruins world, and even in a sense, the Yuangu Palace is older than the ruins world, and it even exists for more than two cosmic epochs!"

"What!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The world of ruins is a world left over from the previous cosmic era, and the Yuangu Hall is actually left over from an even more distant cosmic era, which is too surprising.

Immediately, the Kunwu Supreme said about the situation of the Yuangu Palace.

After a general understanding of the basic situation, Ye Tian really realized the amazing opportunity of the Yuan Gu Palace.

In fact, the Terrans still don't know much about the Yuangu Palace, and even the Protoss knows very little about the Yuangu Palace.

The time of the appearance of the Yuangu Hall is uncertain, it will take a long time to appear, and the time of each appearance is almost irregular, and no one can predict when the Yuangu Palace will appear.

It has been 130 million years since the last Yuan Gu Temple was born.

At that time, the human race was not a cosmic race, but an ordinary small race, oppressed by the universe, and had not even entered the Yuangu Palace.

Now, the Terrans' understanding of the Yuangu Hall is the intelligence gathered from other universe clans.

But one thing is undeniable, the Yuangu Hall is very mysterious.

The only pity is that the fate of the Yuan Gu Hall is of great use to individuals, and it is of little use to a race or a force.

And there is no restriction on the cultivation of the Yuangu Palace, even the Supreme can enter the Yuangu Palace, and the god level can also enter the Yuangu Palace, as for the emperor, it is not necessary to enter, although you can also go in, but even the coercion of the Yuangu Palace can't bear it, and it is estimated that you can't even walk when you go in, so what's the use of going in?

From the mouth of Kunwu Supreme, I learned that the Yuangu Palace had issued countless Yuangu Orders, and as long as you held the Yuangu Order, you could enter the Yuangu Palace.

And now, the cosmic clans are all competing for the Yuan Gu Order.

According to the time calculation, ten years after the appearance of the Yuangu Order, it was the day when the Yuangu Palace was born.
